subject: [DCAEGEN2] Upgrade vescollector to 1.9.2
commit_message:
[DCAEGEN2] Upgrade vescollector to 1.9.2

Removed unnecessary dependencies:
 json-simple
 unirest-java
 commons-collections
 junit-jupiter
 mockito-junit-jupiter
 jimfs
 wiremock-standalone
 spring-security-test
 functionaljava

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2682
Signed-off-by: Maciej Malewski <maciej.malewski@nokia.com>
Change-Id: Ic0986996d687ec02aca1f13a31194ca77e3cdff2

Patch Set 4: Code-Review-1

hmmm... correct me if I'm wrong but shouldn't the prometheus metrics be explicitly enabled from the helm chart rather than hardcoding their enablement in the image?

Patch Set 4:

> Patch Set 4: Code-Review-1
> 
> hmmm... correct me if I'm wrong but shouldn't the prometheus metrics be explicitly enabled from the helm chart rather than hardcoding their enablement in the image?

This just exposes end-point with metrics (and this requires compilation-time changes). However actual metrics won't be gathered until Prometheus integration is enabled via Helm values as you mentioned. This was agreed with Vijay and discussed on OOM weekly as well.

> > Patch Set 4: Code-Review-1
> > 
> > hmmm... correct me if I'm wrong but shouldn't the prometheus metrics be explicitly enabled from the helm chart rather than hardcoding their enablement in the image?
> 
> This just exposes end-point with metrics (and this requires compilation-time changes). However actual metrics won't be gathered until Prometheus integration is enabled via Helm values as you mentioned. This was agreed with Vijay and discussed on OOM weekly as well.

Yeah that's true and as you remember I raised the point that those metrics should not compromise the security and I'm afraid that they do in this case.

So based on my understanding (please correct me if I'm wrong) you have a service of type NodePort here and since this patch it will be exposing to the outside of the cluster not only its main functionality but also this unprotected endpoint with prometheus metrics no?

As agreed on OOM weekly we will wait for the changes in common.service (_service.tpl) which will be made by Sylvain. They will support creation of internal service for the metrics purposes. Meeting notes for the reference: https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/OOM+Meeting+Notes+-+2021-05-12.

Once this is available minor changes in VES will be needed: 
- exposing metrics on a different port
- utilizing changes in common.service via values configuration 
This will come with separate tickets.
